title: Remove all instances of named return "err" from Libpod
body:
This was inspired by https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/pull/3934 and much of the logic for it is contained there. However, in brief, a named return called "err" can cause lots of code confusion and encourages using the wrong err variable in defer statements, which can make them work incorrectly. Using a separate name which is not used elsewhere makes it very clear what the defer should be doing.

As part of this, remove a large number of named returns that were not used anywhere. Most of them were once needed, but are no longer necessary after previous refactors (but were accidentally retained).
